steps.title: Find the square total
steps.content:
Each square has perimeter $4r$. With $3$ squares, the total square perimeter is
$$3(4r)=12r$$

steps.title: Find the triangle total
steps.content:
Each equilateral triangle has perimeter $3t$. With $5$ triangles, the total triangle perimeter is
$$5(3t)=15t$$

steps.title: Set the perimeter sum
steps.content: The sum of all perimeters is $204$. $$12r+15t=204$$ The answer is C.
